archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) combined with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
rationale: For an internal school/academy app used by teachers, coaches, and wardens, the interface needs the structure and authority of a Swiss grid for rapid tasks like attendance, but also requires the approachability, energy, and distinct color-coding of Vibrant Play to keep motivation high across diverse roles.

typography.guidelines: Never center body text. Left-align lists, labels, and forms. Use overlines heavily for task statuses (e.g., 'IN PROGRESS') and roles.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-First 'Tactile Bento'. The screen is broken down into chunky, tap-friendly zones. High density for lists, high breathing room for dashboards.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: flex flex-col gap-4 (stacked blocks) with horizontal scroll lists (flex-row gap-4 overflow-x-auto) for quick stats
layout_and_spacing.safe_areas: Always apply padding-bottom to account for the bottom tab bar and iOS home indicator.

buttons.primary: bg-[#3B28CC] text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold active:opacity-80 active:scale-[0.98] flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#EBE9FE] text-[#3B28CC] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold active:opacity-80 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.ghost: text-slate-500 active:bg-slate-100 rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-medium

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base text-slate-900 focus-within:border-[#3B28CC] focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#3B28CC]/20 transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2

pills_and_tags.style: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

bottom_tab_bar.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-200 pt-3 pb-safe-6 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

icons_and_assets.size: 24px for navigation, 20px for inline, 16px for metadata

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Snappy, spring-based interactions to make rapid tasks (like marking 30 students present) feel satisfying, not tedious.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use React Native LayoutAnimation or Reanimated for list shuffling and expanding cards.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Haptic feedback (Vibration) on task completion, attendance marking, and gate pass approvals.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on status pills exceeds 4.5:1. (e.g. use deep text on light backgrounds)
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48 logical pixels for all tap targets.
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory 'testID' (React Native equivalent of data-testid) on all buttons, tabs, and list items (e.g. testID='mark-present-btn').

media_and_images.strategy: Minimal photography. Rely on avatars and clean geometric icons. Use photography only for user profiles and login background.

image_urls.description: Library study scene for the login view, wrap with a heavy gradient overlay (black/40) to make the login form pop.
Athlete running track, alternate login background for coaches/sports staff.
Example portrait for the current user's profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: This is a mobile app. Translate standard web Tailwind classes (like 'hover:', 'backdrop-blur') to their React Native/Expo equivalents (e.g. active opacity, absolute overlays, or NativeWind equivalents).
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Never use HTML components (div, span). Use standard React Native components: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, TextInput.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For attendance marking, avoid multiple screens. Use a long ScrollView with large tap targets (List Items) where the teacher can toggle Present/Absent directly on the row.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The Warden dashboard should prioritize high-contrast alerts (Pending Gate Passes) at the very top.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Apply 'testID' instead of 'data-testid' for all interactable elements since this is React Native.
